title: First-Order RC Low-Pass Filter with Source and Load Effects
description: Design and verify a first-order RC low-pass filter from a textual specification, explicitly accounting for source resistance and load resistance. The generated circuit must be SPICE-simulatable, measurable through .meas directives, and evaluated under nominal and tolerance-aware conditions.
objective: Obtain a first-order RC low-pass filter that preserves the signal in the low-frequency region while providing at least 20 dB attenuation at 2 kHz, with explicit inclusion of source and load effects.

llm_task.expected_output: A valid ngspice-compatible netlist implementing a first-order RC low-pass filter with explicit source and load, AC analysis, and .meas directives for required metrics.
llm_task.topology_hint: Series source resistance feeding an RC low-pass network, with capacitor to ground and resistive load at the output node.

all_of.rationale: The passband edge at 200 Hz must remain close to the expected cutoff behavior.
The passive filter must not exhibit gain above 0 dB.
The attenuation at 2 kHz must be at least 20 dB.

robustness.description: Tolerance-aware robustness assessment under component variations.
robustness.robust_acceptance_rule: All nominal acceptance criteria must remain satisfied for every sweep combination.

decision_protocol.run_definition: The generated netlist parses and executes successfully in ngspice, and all required nominal measurements are extractable.
decision_protocol.pass_definition: The design satisfies all nominal acceptance criteria.
decision_protocol.robust_pass_definition: The design satisfies all nominal acceptance criteria under all robustness sweep conditions.

checks: Source resistance must be explicitly present.
Load resistance must be explicitly present.
The circuit must implement a first-order passive low-pass behavior.
The output node must be measurable and consistent across the netlist and .meas directives.

primary_selection_metric.name: gain_2kHz_db
primary_selection_metric.description: Among passing candidates, prefer the design with the strongest attenuation at 2 kHz.

expected_failure_modes: Invalid .meas syntax for AC magnitude extraction.
Nominal pass achieved but robustness failure under capacitor tolerance.

metadata.paper_alignment: Reproducible SPICE-based verification of LLM-generated passive circuits
